title: All we can do is wait
display_title: All we can do is wait
wikitext:
[]: All we can do is wait...             Quote Post by Number 44 » Sat Nov 20, 2010 12:31 pm Though there are MANY dub/sub differences in EoE, and as many topics on the subject as there are differences, I was wondering if anyone had covered this one here before. Hyuga's last line in the opening scene at Nerve. Dub: Hyuga: All we can do is wait and see. Sub: Hyuga: All we can do is wait for the Instrumentality Project to commence. This one has always bothered me because, in my opinion, it changes the entire feel of the scene. They already know that Instrumentality was about to take place! I always took it that only the high ups in NERV knew about the Instrumentality Project. So if the rest of NERV knows, how much did they know? What did they think Instrumentality was? What were they expecting to happen?

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Sat Nov 20, 2010 12:52 pm I guess this has a lot to do with the cryptic nature of the Japanese language. The one responsible for the subs assumed that from the context (as pretty much anything can be omitted in spoken Japanese as long as it makes sense in the context) - although I think that's false information. However, I do not understand Japanese well enough to go and check the manuscript so I'll let someone else clear this up.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sat Nov 20, 2010 1:01 pm Hmm. The dubbed line never bothered me because I always assumed it meant that they had all been fed false or misleading information about the project. Interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sat Nov 20, 2010 1:05 pm Oz wrote: I guess this has a lot to do with the cryptic nature of the Japanese language. The one responsible for the subs assumed that from the context (as pretty much anything can be omitted in spoken Japanese as long as it makes sense in the context) - although I think that's false information. However, I do not understand Japanese well enough to go and check the manuscript so I'll let someone else clear this up.

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Sat Nov 20, 2010 3:02 pm it bothered me too when i was watching EoE the second time, and i noticed it. but wasn't Hyuga helping Misato out with her snooping around in the last few eps of the series? i figured maybe he found something then, and probably didn't fully understand what was happening but at least knew the basic name of the project and that that was a definite goal, whatever it was. i figured he had his own ideas about it and shared it with the others, so they thought they knew what was going on but they really didn't.
